prompt: Select the correct tool, material, or replacement approach and explain why the observed choice is wrong.
scenario: You are on a residential job — a service call, remodel, or homeowner installation with prescriptive code and manufacturer instructions. The work under review is Overcurrent device selection & coordination, part of the Electrical scope. The observed field condition is: breaker/conductor ampacity mismatch. The work is staged — materials, tools, and access are ready, but work has not begun. Reference material on hand: NEC 240, 210.8, 210.12, 110.14(C) termination temp ratings.
title: Tool and material selection: Overcurrent device selection & coordination (residential job)
